Legal

Terms of Service

Schedule discovery only

Dancr is for verified schedules, follows, notifications, social profile links, and directions. It is not dating, messaging, escorting, or direct solicitation.

  • 18+ only.
  • No escorting or illegal services.
  • No direct sexual solicitation.
  • No fake profiles or impersonation.
  • No harassment, threats, or abuse.
  • No private messaging.
  • Schedule discovery only.

Trust and review

Dancer profiles, photos, shifts, venues, and reports are subject to review. Accounts, content, venues, or shifts that break the rules may be removed.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Data we use

We use account details, city settings, follows, notifications, profile submissions, shift posts, venue details, and safety reports to operate the app.

Why we use it

  • Show verified schedules, profiles, venues, and directions.
  • Send notifications about followed dancers and posted shifts.
  • Review dancer verification, photos, venues, and reports.
  • Protect against fake profiles, harassment, illegal services, and rule-breaking content.

Private by default

Customer profiles are not public. Dancr has no private messaging, no public follows, and no public going list.

Safety

Community Guidelines

House rules

  • 18+ only.
  • No escorting.
  • No illegal services.
  • No direct sexual solicitation.
  • No fake profiles.
  • No harassment.
  • No private messaging.
  • Schedule discovery only.

Review standards

Dancer profiles, ID/selfie checks, photos, venues, and reports are reviewed for trust and safety. Rule-breaking content may be removed.

Billing and refunds

Refund details stay with the legal terms instead of the bottom footer.

Legal

Refund Policy

Dancer profile access

Dancer profile access is free right now. No monthly subscription is due.

Approval before activation

Public profiles unlock only after platform approval. Rejected profiles stay private and are not published.

Billing control

Dancers can manage recurring subscriptions through the Stripe billing portal. Refund requests are reviewed for billing errors, duplicate charges, or account actions caused by platform review.

  • Profile, social, share, and direction analytics

Profile setup

Finish verification to go live

Complete each step in order. Dancr reviews your profile, photos, ID/selfie, and proof that you dance before your public profile and shift posting unlock.

Edit profile Update public profile fields, resubmit rejected photos or social links, and preview your profile.
Post schedule Add or update the shift customers see on your public profile and venue page.

Photos Manage profile pictures

Profile controls are ready.

Shift posting

Post or update a verified shift

Choose the club, date, and time. Dancr broadcasts the shift to followers and notify-only customers after posting.

Broadcastfollowers notified
Profileschedule updates live
Venue pageshift appears there
Profile cards show active checked-in shifts as Working Now. Upcoming shifts show the date only. Exact times are private and used for shift windows and QR commission eligibility.
Schedule sent to followers and notify-only customers.
Schedule broadcast Broadcast confirmation appears here after posting.

Dancr shows how many followers and notify-only customers received the shift alert, so dancers can see the value immediately.

Manage shifts

Posted shifts

See every posted shift here. Edit or delete any shift; public cards only show Working Now or the closest upcoming shift.
